title: Dressleria suavis

Further, it is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Dressleria. The Dressleria genus is named after Robert Dressler, a botanist who studied orchids. Dressleria suavis is native to Central and South America, and its classification reflects its unique characteristics within the orchid family.
